_publications._publicationTitle: A clinically and genomically annotated nerve sheath tumor biospecimen repository
_publications._context: Patient 2-023 MPNST tumor tissue clinically and genomically characterized in the Johns Hopkins NF1 biospecimen repository; PDX not established until PMID:33591953

_publications._publicationTitle: Chromosome 8 gain is associated with high-grade transformation in MPNST
_publications._context: JH-2-023 PDX established from primary paraspinal NF1-MPNST; characterized for chromosome 8q gain (95.86%); one of 8 NF1-MPNST PDX lines

_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology
_publications._fundingAgency: NTAP; NCI; Department of Defense CDMRP
_publications._context: JH-2-023 PDX included in ex vivo 3D microtissue platform study; microtissue quality not determined (ND)

basicInfo.description: NF1-associated high-grade primary MPNST patient-derived xenograft established at Johns Hopkins University; patient tissue first characterized in the JH NF1 biospecimen repository (PMID:32561749); PDX established in PMID:33591953
basicInfo.clinicalData: Sex: Male; Age at MPNST: 25 years; NF1 diagnosis age: 11–20 years; dermal neurofibromas: scattered; plexiform neurofibromas: present; optic glioma: absent; family history of NF1: yes; MPNST grade: High; MPNST location: paraspinal; MPNST type: primary; MPNST size: 6 cm; clinical status: NED
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Oncology, Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine; Sidney Kimmel Comprehensive Cancer Center
